messages.subject: Meridian SOW review — let's find a time
messages.body:
Dr. Fong,

Our counsel (Orion Legal) has reviewed the SOW draft and we have a few redline items to discuss. Nothing blocking — two clauses we'd like to align on before execution.

Would February 18 at 2pm PT work for a 45-minute call? Priya will join from our side.

— Tessa

messages.subject: Re: Meridian SOW review — let's find a time
messages.body:
Hi Tessa,

Feb 18 at 2pm PT doesn't work — I have a standing board prep that runs until 3pm.

Can we do Feb 19 at 11am PT, or Feb 20 at 10am PT?

— Alan

messages.subject: Re: Meridian SOW review — let's find a time
messages.body:
Feb 19 at 11am PT works for us. I'll send a calendar invite.

— Tessa

messages.subject: Calendar invite: Meridian SOW Review Call — Feb 19, 11am PT
messages.body:
Sending the calendar invite now. Details below.

Title: Meridian Health Systems / Vectrix — SOW Review
Date: Wednesday, February 19, 2026
Time: 11:00am – 11:45am PT
Zoom: https://vectrix.zoom.us/j/84726193048
Pasword: sow2026

Agenda:
1. Review two redline items from Orion Legal (SLA credits, termination clause)
2. Per-org retention config timeline (VEC-47)
3. SAML SSO activation timeline
4. Next steps to contract execution

— Nina
